info.title: TMDB + IMDB Merged Movies Dataset
info.subtitle: 400k TMDB Dataset with added features of Directors, Writers and Movie Cast
info.description:
This dataset merges movie information from The Movie Database (TMDb) and IMDb, providing a detailed collection of movie-related data. The dataset includes a variety of movie attributes such as titles, release dates, ratings, genres, production companies, and more, making it a valuable resource for movie-related analysis, recommendation systems, and other data science tasks.

## Dataset Use Cases:
- **Movie Analysis**: Analyze trends in movie genres, production companies, revenue, and ratings.
- **Recommendation Systems**: Build recommendation models based on movie genres, average ratings, and popularity.
- **Sentiment Analysis**: Use the overview, tagline, and keywords for text analysis to extract sentiments or topics.
- **Visualization**: Create visualizations of movie ratings, revenue vs. budget, and genre popularity.
- **Predicting Movie Ratings**: Predict movie ratings (`vote_average`) using features like `revenue`, `popularity`, `genre`, and `runtime` to assess how financial success, audience engagement, and movie length impact ratings.


# Acknowledgments:
## TMDb Dataset:
The movie data from The Movie Database (TMDb) has been sourced from Kaggle, contributed by [asaniczka](https://www.kaggle.com/datasets/asaniczka/tmdb-movies-dataset-2023-930k-movies). TMDb provides a comprehensive API with data on movies, TV shows, and more, which is freely available for non-commercial use.

## IMDb Dataset:
The IMDb movie data has been sourced from the IMDb Non-Commercial Datasets available at [IMDb Non-Commercial Datasets](https://developer.imdb.com/non-commercial-datasets/). IMDb provides subsets of movie data for personal and non-commercial use, and this dataset is used with permission from IMDb under their Non-Commercial License. Please refer to IMDb’s terms and conditions for more details on the usage restrictions.



Photo from [Pinterest](https://www.pinterest.com/pin/302444931210796190/)
info.userSpecifiedSources:
This dataset is a combination of two main data sources:

TMDb Data: The movie data from The Movie Database (TMDb) was sourced from the publicly available dataset on Kaggle, contributed by [asaniczka](https://www.kaggle.com/datasets/asaniczka/tmdb-movies-dataset-2023-930k-movies). This dataset includes information on over 930,000 movies, such as movie titles, release dates, revenue, and more.

IMDb Data: The IMDb data was sourced from IMDb's official Non-Commercial Datasets, available at https://developer.imdb.com/non-commercial-datasets/. This data includes IMDb ratings, votes, directors, and other related movie information. The data is used under IMDb’s Non-Commercial License for personal and non-commercial use.
